creator: hiroo@exp.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
hi.

> pkg_add: could not find package XFree86-3.3.3.1 !

There is same case in PR ports/10410, I think.
with FreeBSD-2.2.8-RELEASE, you should do

 cd /; tar zxvf /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/pkgreg.tar.gz

as user root. If you can't find the tar ball, do
 mkdir /var/db/pkg/XFree86-3.3.3.1
as described in the comment to PR ports/10410

BTW, I've encountered same error with 3.1-RELEASE and I can't find
pkgreg.tar.gz.
----
Hiroo ONO   mailto:hiroo@exp.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
